meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Scale Your Freelance SaaS Builds
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to automate your development workflow and ship high-end SaaS apps faster.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves scaling bottlenecks by standardizing your architecture and automating boilerplate. By pairing this with Claude Code, you transform manual coding into an orchestrated AI-driven pipeline. This workflow reduces development time by 70%, allowing you to take on more clients without sacrificing build quality or project maintainability.
content.intro:
You’re staring at the same codebase you wrote six months ago, realizing it’s become a tangled web of technical debt that makes every new feature request a nightmare. You have the skills to build, but you don't have the time to scale. The dream of a high-velocity freelance agency is suffocating under the weight of manual scaffolding and repetitive setup cycles.

It’s time to break gravity. The Antigravity project template isn't just code—it’s an opinionated, production-ready foundation designed to eliminate the 'blank page' syndrome. When you integrate this with Claude Code, you stop writing boilerplate and start architecting solutions. Let's move from manual labor to automated precision.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Foundation
steps.description: Standardize your project structure immediately. This step pulls the proven architecture that ensures your SaaS is modular and ready for rapid feature expansion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard template with authentication, PostgreSQL integration, and responsive Tailwind layouts.

steps.title: Configure Domain-Driven Schema
steps.description: Define your database models to ensure data integrity and prevent the common 'spaghetti database' trap that kills scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a domain-driven schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application with roles for Admins, Managers, and Users.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate prisma schema based on SaaS multi-tenant requirements'

steps.title: Automate Feature Injection
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject business logic into your templates without manual file creation, maintaining the integrity of your directory structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new CRUD feature for 'Project Tasks' ensuring all API routes, types, and UI components follow the Antigravity naming convention.

steps.title: Implement Type-Safe API Layers
steps.description: Ensure your frontend and backend communicate flawlessly by generating type-safe contracts automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate TRPC routers for the newly created Task feature and ensure full TypeScript interface coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'sync types between client and server for Task feature'

steps.title: Deploy to Production Pipeline
steps.description: Finalize your build pipeline so that every commit is tested, linted, and ready for client delivery.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure CI/CD workflows for Vercel deployment with automated linting and integration tests.

pro_tips: Always use the --dry-run flag with Claude Code when making structural changes to see how the AI interprets your directory architecture.
Maintain a 'context' file in your root directory; Claude Code reads this to understand your specific client's unique coding style.
Use Antigravity's 'Component Registry' to swap out UI libraries without breaking your underlying business logic.
Batch your prompts: group related feature requests into a single Claude Code session to maintain semantic consistency across files.
Leverage the Antigravity 'Hooks' folder to offload repetitive logic like logging, analytics, and error tracking away from your core business logic.
content.next_steps: Once your template is running, focus on building a 'Component Library' specific to your agency's design language to further speed up future client projects.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start scaling your freelance empire with a professional, automated workflow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
